# compare.head_to_head { #tslai.compare.head_to_head }

```python
tslai.compare.head_to_head(
    painters,
    *,
    T_admix=300.0,
    n_admix=12,
    n_ref=12,
    sequence_length=100000.0,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    Ne=1000,
    T_split=5000.0,
    f_A=0.5,
    seed=1,
    substrates=('true',),
    mutation_rate=4e-07,
)
```

Score a panel of painters on one admixture scenario across ARG substrates.

Simulates a single admixture scenario, then scores every painter on each
requested ARG substrate.

SINGER is intentionally left to
:func:`tslai.experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment` (it samples an ensemble
rather than a single ts); external tools slot in as painters.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**painters**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[str](`str`), [callable](`callable`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Mapping name -> painter ``f(ts, labels, queries) -> {sample: [Segment]}``.

<code>[**T_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Time (generations ago) of the admixture pulse.

<code>[**n_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [12]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of admixed individuals (queries).

<code>[**n_ref**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [12]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of individuals sampled from each reference source.

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [100000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Simulated sequence length in base pairs.

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-08]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base, per-generation recombination rate.

<code>[**Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1000]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Diploid effective population size.

<code>[**T_split**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Time (generations ago) at which the two sources coalesce.

<code>[**f_A**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.5]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Fraction of the admixed population contributed by source A.

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Random seed for the simulation (and tsinfer mutation overlay).

<code>[**substrates**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tuple](`tuple`)\[[str](`str`), ...\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [(\'true\',)]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   ARG substrates to score on; each is ``"true"`` or ``"tsinfer"``.

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [4e-07]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Mutation rate used to overlay variants before tsinfer inference.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Nested ``{substrate: {painter_name: scores}}``, where ``scores`` is the dict returned by :func:`score_painter`.

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[ValueError](`ValueError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If a substrate other than ``"true"`` or ``"tsinfer"`` is requested.
